subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones! Come, let us heave a sigh from the depths of our hearts and kindle a fire within our souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیبان بیائید آهی از دل برکشیم و ناری بر جانها زنیم
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @love as fire, @Manifestation of God as sun
